frame_analyses.description: Setup view showing gauze suspended between clamps with marked circular pattern (4cm diameter)
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good initial setup, gauze properly tensioned, clear circular marking visible

frame_analyses.description: Left grasper approaching gauze while right grasper with scissors positioned
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper instrument approach, good coordination between both hands

frame_analyses.description: Left grasper stabilizing gauze while right scissors making initial entry cut
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good gauze tension control, scissors positioned close to marked line

frame_analyses.description: Continuing circular cut in clockwise direction, maintaining gauze tension
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth cutting motion, maintaining consistent distance from line

frame_analyses.description: Progressing around circle, gauze being manipulated to maintain optimal cutting angle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good tissue handling, scissors following curved path well

frame_analyses.description: Continuing around circle, cut appears to deviate slightly from line at bottom
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Some deviation visible, gauze tension maintained

frame_analyses.description: Approaching completion of circular cut, gauze still attached to clamps
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Nearing completion, cut path generally following circle

frame_analyses.description: Final stages of cutting, circular piece being separated
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task appears complete, circular pattern cut out successfully

penalties.description: Minor deviation from marked line visible at bottom portion of circle

confidence_rationale: Time measurement well-observed from video frames. Deviation measurements estimated from camera angle which may not show precise distances at all cardinal points. Task completion clearly visible.
cannot_determine: Exact mm measurements at all cardinal points due to camera perspective
Precise deviation at some portions where camera angle is oblique
technique_summary: Good intermediate performance with steady cutting technique and proper gauze handling. Completion time within expert range but precision could be improved.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining closer distance to marked line throughout cut
Take more time at curved portions to ensure precision
